description: You are a Senior Business Analyst preparing a unit economics review for the quarterly business meeting. Using the order data at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx, build an Oracle Analytics workbook named 'unit_economics' and save it as 'unit_economics.dva' to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\. The workbook must include three canvases: 'Unit Profitability' with a calculated column 'Profit_Per_Unit' (Profit divided by Quantity Ordered) and a calculated column 'Profit_Tier' that classifies each order as 'High Margin' when Profit_Per_Unit exceeds 20, 'Low Margin' when Profit_Per_Unit is positive but at most 20, and 'Loss Making' otherwise, displayed as a 100% Stacked Bar chart of Profit_Tier proportions by Product Category titled 'Order Profitability Distribution by Category'; 'Cost Structure' with a calculated column 'Total_Cost_Ratio' ((Shipping Cost + Discount) / Sales * 100) shown as a Combo chart with Product Sub Category on the horizontal axis, average Total_Cost_Ratio as bars and average Profit as a line on the secondary axis, sorted descending by Total_Cost_Ratio, titled 'Cost Burden vs Profitability by Sub-Category'; and 'Segment Efficiency' with a Pivot Table of Customer Segment rows by Ship Mode columns showing average Profit_Per_Unit, with conditional formatting using red for negative and green for positive values, titled 'Unit Profit by Segment and Shipping Mode'. All canvases must use the sample_order_lines2023 dataset.
